title: Another 31 ending Train station scene explained
display_title: Another 31 ending Train station scene explained
wikitext:
[]: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Sun Sep 29, 2024 4:31 pm I was never satisfied with popular ending theories. And I think I finally got it. SDAT player and character progression We now know that Ikari Gendo previously owned the player. Player also shows the progression of Shinji as a person. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Sep 29, 2024 6:02 pm It's an interesting theory, but I have doubts a change of peespective could really explain the situation in the train station scene. A timeskip (after the Earth being repared) needs to happen for the Earth return to the state we see in the train station scene. I wouldn't say a timeskip is impossible (it would explain Shinji being an adult), but the situation with the DSS Choker is weird. Weird_ocean wrote: Why we see Asuka, Kaworu and Rei being normal people, wearing normal clothes? Again, it’s HOW he sees them NOW, his perspective changed, but the world is the same. He sees them now as normal people in normal world, because they ARE. He might not actually see them, but that's how he perceives them now. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Sun Sep 29, 2024 6:25 pm Konja7 wrote: It's an interesting theory, but I have doubts a change of peespective could really explain the situation in the train station scene. A timeskip (after the Earth being repared) needs to happen for the Earth return to the state we see in the train station scene. I wouldn't say a timeskip is impossible (it would explain Shinji being an adult), but the situation with the DSS Choker is weird.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Oct 07, 2024 9:28 am Interesting! Konja7 wrote: A timeskip (after the Earth being repared) needs to happen for the Earth return to the state we see in the train station scene.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Mon Oct 07, 2024 11:42 am nerv bae wrote: Interesting! Why does a timeskip need to happen for the Earth to return to the state we see in the train station scene?

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon Oct 07, 2024 3:15 pm Weird_ocean wrote: I think Mari and Shinji returned to reality right after Asuka did, and the world looks exactly how they left it, but without the EVAs, red contamination, red seas, clones and angels, because the world is just normal now. And everybody has their memories of what happened.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Mon Oct 07, 2024 4:05 pm C.T.1290 wrote: But how are the clones Rei, Kaworu, and Asuka still around? They shouldn’t exist without the EVAs around, as their whole existence is tied directly to them.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon Oct 07, 2024 7:56 pm Weird_ocean wrote: C.T.1290#943873 wrote: But how are the clones Rei, Kaworu, and Asuka still around? They shouldn’t exist without the EVAs around, as their whole existence is tied directly to them.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Tue Oct 08, 2024 1:37 am C.T.1290 wrote: Weird_ocean#943875 wrote: Yeah, but people have been saying that Asuka is back at Kensuke’s place, with her entry plug right next to it. What baffles me is that if Shinji remade the world with no EVAs, then why is she still here? She’s a clone with the Evangelions being the sole reason for her whole existence.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Oct 09, 2024 6:32 pm C.T.1290 wrote: Yeah, but people have been saying that Asuka is back at Kensuke’s place, with her entry plug right next to it. What baffles me is that if Shinji remade the world with no EVAs, then why is she still here? She’s a clone with the Evangelions being the sole reason for her whole existence.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Wed Oct 09, 2024 10:38 pm Konja7 wrote: I'm not really sure Kaji in the instrumentality is Kaji's soul.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Oct 10, 2024 6:00 am Weird_ocean wrote: It was not a projection, it was Shinji. Remember how he said to Rei " You're still Ayanami " before she died? In Japanese he said " Ayanami wa Ayanami da ". Ayanami is Ayanami. Well that's exactly what he said to Asuka in Japanese: " Asuka wa Asuka da " Asuka is Asuka. It's exactly the same phrase. And Kensuke never called her Asuka, only Shikinami. And there is plenty of proof.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Thu Oct 10, 2024 6:25 am Konja7 wrote: I don't think "Kensuke" in the instrumentaliry is Shinji.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Oct 10, 2024 6:57 am Weird_ocean wrote: How can you explain Kensuke doll in the studio? It's such a specific thing to be there. It can't be just random. How do explain EVA-costumes? At that point, Rei and Shinji were the only ones left in the "studio", there were inly EVA 01 and EVA 00 as costumes. There is nothing random in EVA, nothing else from Asuka's memories were in the studio, only Kensuke-doll. Why? How do you explain the specific use of words that only Shinji could use? Can you provide explanation for any of that? I presented proof. I need some arguments.

[]: Re: Another 3+1 ending. Train station scene explained             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Thu Oct 10, 2024 7:33 am Konja7 wrote: Well, Kensuke doll is only shown when Shinji mentioned how Asuka found her place, so I really think it's a reference. Also, Kensuke doll and Shinji appearing in the "studio" would imply Kensuke doll isn't Shinji.
